kill_fact: No kill. The load-bearing facts survive independent primary-source verification: (a) the catalyst is REAL, dated 'mid-2026', and UN-FIRED as of 22-Jun-2026 (no 8-K/PR disclosing an FDA outcome exists in any search) — but it is a soft window and an FDA pathway-feedback PERCEPTION event, NOT a binding PDUFA or contractual deal-terms arb, so the bull's PENDING_HARD framing is only soft-true and decays to SOFT_EXTENDED if 31-Jul passes silent; (b) the $544.6M cash / 31-Mar-2026 / runway-into-3Q-2028 / no going-concern floor is CONFIRMED, net cash ~$2.83/sh on 192.3M shares is CONFIRMED, so solvency is not at risk through the event and the $3.50 floor sits genuinely above net cash. The only material bull mischaracterization: WVE is NOT a structural non-diluter — it priced a $350M upsized public offering at $19.00 in Dec-2025 (~6 months ago), so 'no dilution / funded clean' is true only for THIS window and masks a serial-diluter register; a disappointing print into a risk-off XBI tape removes the dilution restraint and the equity is a pure pre-revenue option that can trade below the $3.50 model floor on sentiment alone.
corrections: (1) Re-characterize 'no ATM/dilution' — accurate that no ACTIVE raise is disclosed and the company is funded through the catalyst, but WVE has a recent serial-financing history ($350M offering at $19 in Dec-2025); the floor is solvency-backed, not a no-dilution guarantee. (2) catalyst_status is soft: 'mid-2026' is management guidance, not a binding date — treat as PENDING_HARD only inside the 31-Jul outer window; degrade to SOFT_EXTENDED if undisclosed past 31-Jul. (3) The event is pathway feedback (timing/route de-risk), NOT approval — the $11 is a probabilistic re-rate, not a deal-certain payoff; cap conviction accordingly.
evidence: Wave Life Sciences PR, 02-Feb-2026: regained full WVE-006 rights from GSK; plans to engage FDA on a potential accelerated approval pathway, regulatory feedback expected mid-2026 (globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/02/02/3230159)

Wave Life Sciences Q1-2026 results, 28-Apr-2026: $544.6M cash at 31-Mar-2026, runway into 3Q-2028, 192.3M shares outstanding, no going-concern flag, 'expects regulatory feedback on a potential accelerated approval pathway mid-2026'; no ATM/equity-raise disclosed (ir.wavelifesciences.com Q1-2026 release; SEC 10-Q wve-20260331)

Wave Life Sciences PR, 09-Dec-2025: priced upsized $350M public offering — 15,789,475 shares at $19.00 + pre-funded warrants — evidencing a recent serial-diluter register that contradicts the bull's clean-non-diluter framing (ir.wavelifesciences.com 'Prices Upsized $350 Million Public Offering')

Independent search as of 22-Jun-2026: no 8-K, press release, or news disclosing an FDA accelerated-approval pathway outcome for WVE-006 — catalyst confirmed live and un-fired inside the 2026-07-31 outer window
